title: Fully qualified order by column gives "relational query without result"
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), age INTEGER, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO users (id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30), (2, 'Bob', 25), (3, 'Charlie', NULL);
SELECT name, age FROM (SELECT id, name, age, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY age DESC) AS r FROM users) AS ranked_users WHERE r <= 2 ORDER BY r;
CREATE TABLE orders (order_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER, amount DECIMAL(10, 2), FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id));
INSERT INTO orders (order_id, user_id, amount) VALUES (1, 1, 100.50), (2, 2, NULL), (3, 3, 75.00);
key_bug_features: Fully qualified order by column in subquery
